name: what-to-eat-today
description: AI-powered meal recommendation expert — collects your preferences, searches nearby restaurants, and recommends top 3 dishes based on ratings, distance and budget.

displayDescription.en: Can't decide what to eat? Tell me your preferences and I'll recommend the top 3 nearby dishes based on ratings, distance and budget.
displayDescription.zh: 不知道吃什么？告诉我你的口味偏好，我帮你搜索附近美食，综合评分、距离和预算，推荐Top3最佳选择。
